---
title: "test"
author: "Rogie"
format:
    html:
        mainfont: "Courier New"
        toc: true
        toc-title: "Index"
        toc-depth: 2
        smooth-scroll: true
        theme: "darkly"
editor: visual
jupyter: python3
---

# Test Section

This is my first Quarto test.

```{python echo=TRUE, include=TRUE}
print("Hello Rogie")
```

hello helo made 

## chicken baba
